Curated list of awesome Magento 2 Extensions, Resources and other Highlights
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Awesome Magento 2





A curated list of awesome Magento 2 Extensions & Resources

  • What is an awesome list?
  • Contribution guide

Contents

  • Tools
  • Extensions
  • Themes
  • Blogs
  • Learning
  • Platforms
  • Official Resources

Tools

  • n98-magerun2 - The CLI Swiss Army Knife for Magento 2.
  • Documentation Search for Alfredstars9 - Easily integrate the official Magento 2 Search into your Alfred Workflows.
  • VSCode Magento Dev Searchstars11 - Search faster into Magento DevDocs and Magento StackExchange.
  • Tablerates Generator - Generate Tablerates with an online Tool.
  • Pestlestars501 - Code Generation Tool by Alan Storm.
  • Mage2Gen - Online Module Creator.
  • Magento 2 Code Generatorstars239 - Code Generator by Juan Alonso.
  • Magento 2 Docker - Focused to development process, pretty faster on Mac and Linux.
  • Magento 2 Bitnami VM - Focused to development process, works so fine.
  • Mage Chrome Toolbarstars286 - A MUST-HAVE Chrome Extension for Magento 2 by MageSpecialist.
  • convertm1m2stars145 - A simple script to convert extensions from Magento1 to Magento 2.
  • Magento 2 data migration toolstars314 - Official Magento 1 to Magento 2 migration tool
  • Quickorderstars29 - Enables bulk order creation by inputting SKUs & quantities.
  • Cron Schedulerstars71 - Overviews of running crons in your Admin Panel.
  • QuickDevBarstars309 Developer Toolbar for Magento2
  • MageSpecialist DevTools for Magento 2stars168 Developer Toolbar
  • mage2.dockerstars49 - Nginx(Pagespeed), MariaDB, PHP , Redis, Elastic Search Configurator with Magento 2 installer (updated: 19 April 2020)
  • markshust/docker-magentostars1.2k - Mark Shust's Docker Configuration for Magento
  • Wardenstars220 - A CLI utility for working with docker-compose environments by David Alger
  • AmpersandHQ/ampersand-magento2-upgrade-patch-helperstars106 - Helper script to aid upgrading magento 2 websites by detecting overrides.
  • PhpStorm Magento2 Extensionstars309 - Official PhpStorm Magento2 Extension.
  • PhpInsightsstars4k - PHP quality checks (with Magento2 presets)
  • nuzil/magento-postmanstars7 - Postman collections for Magento2
  • Tangostars86 - CLI for analyzing access logs
  • Masqueradestars162 - Faker-driven, configuration-based, platform-agnostic, locale-compatible data faker tool
  • Magento 2 Composer patches helper - Chrome extension to create copy-pastable composer patch definition for vaimo/composer-patches.
  • extdn/installer-m2stars27 - Universal extension installer for Magento 2 by Magento Extension Developers Network
  • mage2click/m2cstars66 - Magento Docker development environment with mutagen.io sync for files on macOS and native filesystem mounts on Linux by mage2.click
  • Migrate DB Magento 2 Commerce to Magento 2 Open-Sourcestars25

Open Source Extensions

Development Utilities

  • Config ImportExportstars110 - CLI Based Config Management.
  • Magento Coding Standardsstars231 - Official Magento2 Advanced Set of Rules for PHP_CodeSniffer.
  • Whoops Exceptionsstars73 - PHP Exceptions for Cool Kids in Magento 2.
  • Magento Cache Cleanstars374 - A faster drop in replacement for bin/magento cache:clean with file watcher by Vinai Kopp](https://twitter.com/vinaikopp)
  • Developer Toolbarstars271 - Magento 2 Developer Toolbar.
  • Advanced Template Hintsstars216 - Magento 2 Template Hints Helper.
  • Magento2 PHPStorm Templatesstars227 - Live templates for Magento2
  • Magento 2 Dockerizestars112 - A composer package for dockerizing Magento 2.
  • Mage2 Vagrantstars258 - Simple Magento 2 Vagrant Box.
  • frontoolsstars421 - Set of front-end tools for Magento 2, based on Gulp.js.
  • Magento 2 gulpfilestars17 - Useful frontend workflow gulp tasks for less-based themes.
  • Scopehintsstars80 - Displays additional information in the Store Configuration by Andreas von Studnitz.
  • PreferencesInfoCommandstars14 - bin/magento command to display configured preferences for classes or interfaces
  • m2installstars77 - Magento 2 Bash Install/Restore Script
  • Magento 2 Configuratorstars159 - A Magento module initially created by CTI Digital to create and maintain database variables using files.
  • Magento Collectstars16 - A Polymer e-commerce element for Magento 2.
  • Auto Cache Flushstars20 - Magento 2 module to automatically flush the cache.
  • MUPstars9 - A bash menu UI generated from a simple configuration file. Built for Magento 2, but not limited to it.
  • Magento 2 PHPStorm File Templatesstars34 - PHPStorm Magento 2 File Templates.
  • Magento 2 Composer Repositorystars17 - Composer Repository Manager for selling Magento 2 extension and offering composer installation for ordered packages.
  • MageVulnDBstars153 - Central repository for third party Magento extensions with known security issues.
  • Painless Magento 2stars8 - A dockerized magento 2 community environment ready for development or production.
  • Magento 2 Debugstars38 - Profiler for debugging Magento 2 performance issues.
  • Magento 2 Prometheus Exporterstars31 - Prometheus Exporter for common Magento Data.
  • Balerstars173 - Smart replacement for Magento2 out-of-the-box JS bundling.
  • graycoreio/magento2-corsstars27 - Enables configurable CORS Headers on the Magento GraphQL API.
  • shkoliar/magento-debug-helperstars11 - Magento 2 Debug Helper Module for easy debugging with Xdebug and PHPStorm or any other IDE by Dmitry Shkoliar

Deployment

  • Capistrano::Magento2stars216 - Magento 2 deployments with Capistrano by David Alger.
  • MageDeploy2stars45 - Automatic Magento2 Deployments with robo and deployer.
  • Magento 2 Deployment Tool - Magento2 Deployment Tool with PHing by Juan Alonso.
  • Deployer Magento2 Recipe - Magento2 deployment recipe for deployer.
  • Magento 2 Deployer Plusstars183 - Tool based on deployer.org to perform zero downtime deployments of Magento 2 projects.
  • Painless Magento 2stars8 - A dockerized magento 2 community environment ready for development or production.
  • Github Actions for Magento2stars57 - GitHub Actions for Magento 2 Extensions

Localization

  • ru_RU - Russian Language Package.
  • de_DEstars84 - German Language Package.
  • de_CHstars6 🇨🇭 - Swiss Language Package.
  • fr_FRstars38 - French Language Package.
  • da_DK 🇩🇰 - Danish Language Package.
  • es_ARstars2 🇦🇷 - Spanish (Argentina) Language Package.
  • es_ESstars12 - Spanish Language Package.
  • pt_BRstars47 🇧🇷 - Portuguese Brazil Language Package.
  • it_ITstars15 - Italian Language.
  • nl_NLstars28 alt. 🇳🇱 - Dutch Language Package.
  • pl_PLstars17 🇵🇱 - Polish Language Package.
  • tr_TRstars27 :tr: - Turkish Language Package.
  • ro_ROstars7 🇷🇴 - Romanian Language Package.
  • fi_FLstars0 🇫🇮 - Finnish Language Package.
  • ko_KRstars4 🇰🇷 - Korean Language Package.
  • sk_SKstars0 🇸🇰 - Slovakian Language Package.
  • sl_SIstars10 🇸🇮 - Slovenian Language Package.
  • en_GBstars3 - British Language Package.
  • Japanese Localization 🇯🇵 - Magento 2 compatibility with Japanese locales + full Japanese translations

Catalog & Checkout

  • Donation Product Modulestars25 - Integration for donations to charities.
  • Clean Checkoutstars279 - A drop in Magento 2 Checkout alternative.

Search

  • Algolia Search Integrationstars131 - Algolia Search(SaaS) Integration.
  • elastic/app-search-magentostars25 - A first party module to integrate Elastic App Search in Magento2.
  • Elastic Suite Integrationstars661 - Elastic Suite Integration.
  • FastSimpleImport2stars122 - Wrapper for Magento 2 ImportExport functionality, which imports products and customers from arrays.

CMS

  • Mageplaza Blog Extensionstars95 - Simple, but well working Blog Extension.
  • Magento 2 Blog Extension by Magefanstars215 - Free Blog module for Magento 2 with unlimited blog posts and categories, SEO friendly, lazy load and AMP support.
  • Bluefoot CMS - CMS Plugin owned by Magento for Magento 2.
  • PageDesignerstars92 - Easily create and drag and drop your CMS contents in the Magento Backend.
  • Mirasvit Blogstars69 - Blog Extension.
  • Magefan Blogstars215 - Blog Extension.
  • MageSuitestars143 - Open Source (free) PageBuilder alternative

Marketing

  • MagePlaza Seostars101 - Well documented multi purpose SEO Extension.
  • Magemonkey Mailchimp Integrationstars47 - Plug & Play Mailchimp Integration.
  • Magento 2 PDFstars52 - PDF Generator based on wkhtmltopdf.
  • Magento 2 SEOstars96 - Sweet & Simple SEO Module by Staempfli.
  • Google Tag Managerstars212 - Google Tag Manager (GTM) with Data Layer for Magento2.

Adminhtml / Backend

  • Customer Force Loginstars148 - Login as a Customer for support reasons.
  • Checkout Testerstars64 - Extension to quickly test Checkout changes.
  • Preview Checkout Success Pagestars62 - quickly and easily preview and test your order confirmation page, without the need to placing a new order each time.
  • Firebear Import/Exportstars162 - Import/Export Improvements for Standard Magento Importer.
  • FireGento Fast Simple Importstars122 - Wrapper for Magento 2 ImportExport functionality, which imports products and customers from arrays
  • Magento 2 Import Frameworkstars126 - A library supporting generic Magento 2 import functionality
  • Image Resizerstars86 - Magento 2 Module to add simple image resizing capabilities in all blocks and .phtml templates by Staempfli.
  • Excel Spreadsheetstars9 - Magento 2 Module for parsing xlsx, xlsm and csv files from Excel by Staempfli.
  • PDF Generatorstars62 - Invoice PDF Generator For Magento 2 by EaDesign.
  • Mobile Detectionstars26 - Mobile detect change theme and redirect based on device type by EaDesign.
  • Menu Editorstars185 - Provides powerful menu editor to replace category based menus in Magento 2.
  • PageNotFoundstars23 - Saves upcoming 404 in your Database with the possibility to created a redirect.
  • Sentry.iostars105 - Application Monitoring and Error Tracking Software for Magento 2
  • EmailCatcher / Loggerstars48 - Saves all emails send by Magento in your database. Adds a grid where they can be viewed.
  • Custom SMTPstars284 - Configure Magento 2 to send all transactional email using Google App, Gmail, Amazon Simple Email Service (SES), Microsoft Office365 and other SMTP server.
  • Reset Customer Passwordstars24 - Set a customer password with bin/magento by Vinai Kopp.
  • Admin Auto Loginstars15 - Automatically login to Magento 2 admin, very useful for demo
  • Guest to Customerstars59 - Quickly and easily convert existing guest checkout customers to registered customers.
  • Reset UI Bookmarksstars15 - Reset UI Bookmarks allows admin users to reset their own UI bookmarks such as state of filters, column positions and applied sorting ( e.g Sales > Orders ).
  • Clean Admin Menustars87 - Merges 3rd party extensions to a single menu.
  • auroraextensions/simplereturnsstars20 - Self-service RMA for Magento2.
  • shkoliar/magento-grid-colorsstars43 - Magento 2 Grid Colors module for colorizing admin grids. Supports saving of states with the help of grid's bookmarks. by Dmitry Shkoliar
  • extdn/extension-dashboard-m2stars33 - A Magento 2 dashboard to display installed extensions. by Magento Extension Developers Network

Security

  • Secure Password Hashing - Improves Password Hashing for Magento 2.
  • 2FAstars46 - Two Factor Auth for Magento 2.
  • Maleware Scannerstars614 - A collection of rules and samples to detect Magento malware.
  • Magento Patch Repositorystars267 - Every Magento Patch you need all in one place

Payment Service Provider

  • PAYONEstars24 - PAYONE Payment Integration.
  • Stripestars40 - Stripe Payments for Magento 2.
  • Square - Square Payments for Magento 2.
  • Wirecardstars10 - Wirecard Magento 2 Extension.
  • Braintree Payments - Official Braintree Integration for Magento2.
  • Authorize.net Payments - Official Authorize.net integration for Magento2.
  • CyberSource Global Payment Management - Official CyberSource integration for Magento2.
  • eWay Payments - Official eWay integration for Magento2.
  • Payment Requests for Magento2stars9 - Payment Request API for Magento 2.
  • LiqPaystars18 - LiqPay integration extension for Magento 2

Infrastructure

  • Fastly Extensionstars88 - Magento 2 fastly integration.
  • Docker Magento 2stars314 - Magento2 + Varnish + PHP7 + Redis + SSL (cluster ready).
  • Ethan3600/magento2-CronjobManagerstars238 - Cron Job Manager for Magento 2.
  • Magento 2 Ngrokstars32 - Magento 2 Ngrok Integration
  • renatocason/magento2-module-mqstars35 - Lightweight implementation of message queue for Magento2 Community Edition

Mobile Application

  • Magento React Native RESTstars236 - React Native mobile application template for Magento 2.
  • Magento React Native GraphQLstars17 - React Native mobile application template for Magento 2 with GraphQL API and YouTube tutorials.

Proprietary Extensions

  • Commercebug Debugging Extension - A Magento 2 Debug Extension.
  • Magicento - PHPStorm Plugin to add Magento 2 related functionality.
  • Kraken.iostars21 - High Quality Image reduction Service as a SaaS Integration.

Magento Extension Developers Network (ExtDN) The Magento Extension Developers Network (ExtDN) is a vetted network of extension developers whose core business is to develop and sell quality Magento extensions. I founded ExtDN to bring accountability and trust to the Magento extension market. ExtDN members agree to hold themselves accountable to high standards of coding, copyright and business conduct.

Explanation by Fooman

Other Magento 2 related Awesome Lists

  • Mageresstars664 - Alessandro Ronchi's List of resources for Magento 1 and Magento 2.
  • Awesome PHPstars25.4k - A curated List of Awesome PHP Resources.
  • Awesome Magentostars78 - An Awesome Magento List with mixed M1 and M2 Content by sunel.
  • Headless Magento 2stars64 - A list of resources about running Magento 2 headless by Sitewards
  • Magento security resourcesstars11 - A list of security related items for Magento 2.
